description: Portable MCP server for fallback web search and browser-aware fetch.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.rich-jojo/smart-web

environmentVariables.description: Optional Exa key for the first search tier.
environmentVariables.name: EXA_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional Brave Search key for the second search tier.
environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional self-hosted SearXNG base URL for private, no-key search fallback before DuckDuckGo.
environmentVariables.name: SEARXNG_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional toggle to enable or disable Exa search.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTSEARCH_ENABLE_EXA

environmentVariables.description: Optional toggle to enable or disable Brave search.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTSEARCH_ENABLE_BRAVE

environmentVariables.description: Optional toggle to enable or disable SearXNG search.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTSEARCH_ENABLE_SEARXNG

environmentVariables.description: Optional toggle to enable or disable DuckDuckGo fallback search.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTSEARCH_ENABLE_DUCKDUCKGO

environmentVariables.description: Optional toggle to enable or disable Brave Search HTML fallback.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTSEARCH_ENABLE_BRAVE_HTML

environmentVariables.description: Optional explicit Chrome executable path for Playwright.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTFETCH_CHROME_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional opt-in for FxTwitter relay enrichment on X posts.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTFETCH_ENABLE_FXTWITTER

environmentVariables.description: Optional toggle to enable or disable X oEmbed fallback.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTFETCH_ENABLE_X_OEMBED

environmentVariables.description: Optional toggle to enable or disable Reddit JSON enrichment.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTFETCH_ENABLE_REDDIT_JSON

environmentVariables.description: Optional toggle to enable or disable YouTube transcript enrichment.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTFETCH_ENABLE_YOUTUBE_TRANSCRIPT

environmentVariables.description: Optional toggle to enable archive-based fallback for paywalled or blocked pages.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTFETCH_ENABLE_ARCHIVE_FALLBACK

environmentVariables.description: Optional toggle to enable Internet Archive Wayback fallback.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTFETCH_ENABLE_WAYBACK

environmentVariables.description: Optional toggle to enable archive.md fallback.
environmentVariables.name: SMARTFETCH_ENABLE_ARCHIVE_MD

environmentVariables.description: Optional override to allow localhost/private/reserved fetch targets.
environmentVariables.name: SMART_WEB_ALLOW_PRIVATE_HOSTS

environmentVariables.description: Optional mode that disables public fallback and relay-style providers unless explicitly enabled.
environmentVariables.name: SMART_WEB_LOCAL_ONLY

title: smart-web
